show running-config
config-file-header
jap-switch
v1.4.11.5 / R800_NIK_1_4_220_026
CLI v1.0
set system mode router

!
spanning-tree pathcost method short
port jumbo-frame
vlan database
vlan 10-14
exit
hostname jap-switch
ip telnet server
!
interface vlan 10
 name JAP_ALL_DEVICES
 ip address 172.16.128.1 255.255.128.0
!
interface vlan 11
 name TRANSMITTER_1
 ip address 172.16.0.1 255.255.255.252
!
interface vlan 12
 name TRANSMITTER_2
 ip address 172.16.0.5 255.255.255.252
!
interface vlan 13
 name TRANSMITTER_3
 ip address 172.16.0.9 255.255.255.252
!
interface vlan 14
 name TRANSMITTER_4
 ip address 172.16.0.13 255.255.255.252
!
interface GigabitEthernet1
 switchport mode general
 switchport general allowed vlan add 10-11 untagged
 switchport general pvid 11
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface GigabitEthernet2
 switchport mode general
 switchport general allowed vlan add 10,12 untagged
 switchport general pvid 12
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface GigabitEthernet3
 switchport mode general
 switchport general allowed vlan add 10,13 untagged
 switchport general pvid 13
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface GigabitEthernet4
 switchport mode general
 switchport general allowed vlan add 10,14 untagged
 switchport general pvid 14
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface GigabitEthernet5
 switchport mode general
 switchport general allowed vlan add 10-11 untagged
 switchport general pvid 10
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface GigabitEthernet6
 switchport mode general
 switchport general allowed vlan add 10,12-14 untagged
 switchport general pvid 10
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface GigabitEthernet7
 switchport mode general
 switchport general allowed vlan add 10 untagged
 switchport general pvid 10
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface GigabitEthernet8
 switchport mode general
 switchport general allowed vlan add 10,13 untagged
 switchport general pvid 10
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface GigabitEthernet9
 description uplink
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport trunk allowed vlan add 10-14
!
exit
ip default-gateway 10.66.4.1
jap-switch#
